titles.title: Only By Grace Can We Enter

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Only by grace can we enter Only by grace can we stand Not by our human endeavor But by the Blood of the Lamb Into Your presence You call us You call us to come Into Your presence You draw us And now by Your grace we come Now by Your grace we come

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Lord if You mark our transgressions Who will stand Thanks to Your grace We are cleansed by the Blood of the Lamb, Precious Lamb Lord if You mark our transgressions Who will stand Father, thanks to Your grace We are cleansed by the Blood of the Lamb
